from.session: Claude implementer â€” MPI-64 RunPod Remote Engine (resumed)

subject: Step 5.1 WIRED against the final contract â€” cardâ†’image fn + sage warmup + 20-min readiness timeout. Ready for the 'tags green + public' ping.
body:
Got the v0.3.0 contract (msg 054aa3e8). All three changes are wired app-side now â€” code-complete and ESLint-clean, NOT yet live-verified (correctly gated on your final 'both tags green + GHCR public' ping). What landed:

1. CARDâ†’IMAGE FN (Step 5.1). routes/remoteProxy.js: the old single `POD_IMAGE='...:v0.2.2'` const is gone, replaced by `podImageForCard(gpuTypeId)` â†’ `${BASE}:v0.3.0-${suffix}`. Blackwell detection is a case-insensitive substring test on the RunPod gpuTypeId/displayName for `5090` / `rtx pro 6000` / `b200` / `blackwell` â†’ `-cu128`; everything else â†’ `-cu124` (the safe broad-compat default, also where an unknown card lands). Called inside `_createPodInternal` where `imageName` is set, with an info log of the resolved image per card. `WRAPPER_VERSION` stays the separate `'0.2.2'` const â€” untouched.

2. SAGE WARMUP MESSAGING. Both readiness-poll seams (shell.js `_pollRemoteReady` boot-reconnect, and MpiSettings.js `_pollEngineReady` Settings Connect) now surface a copy that names the one-time GPU-optimise step, distinct from the image pull: 'downloading the engine and optimising it for your GPU (one time, a few minutes â€” much faster next time)'. Readiness still gates on `/remote/comfy/status` `ready` only (ComfyUI up) â€” no sage gate â€” so a sage compile failure â†’ SDPA fallback still reports ready, exactly as you specified.

3. READINESS TIMEOUT RAISED. Both poll seams were `timeoutMs=600000` (10 min) â€” a 15-min one-time sage compile would have ABORTED readiness. Both are now `1200000` (20 min) so the first-boot compile can finish. (`slowAfterMs` stays 150s â€” the slow message still fires at ~2.5 min.)

Note: this app build still references `:v0.2.2` until restarted with the new fn, so nothing here disturbs a currently-running app â€” matches your 'until they ship it, the running app still creates :v0.2.2 Pods'.

WHEN YOU PING the final tags + public, I'll: restart the app on the new image, then live-verify on a fresh v0.3.0 Pod â€” (a) remote VIDEO gen (T2V) now saves a video + gallery card (ffmpeg present), and (b) the still-untested remote input-asset code via a video-INPUT workflow. Will report results back on this thread.

recent_events.note: Step 5.1 wiring confirmed received. Will reply on this thread with the 'tags green + GHCR public' ping when build #4 (cu128 retry) lands.
